summary:
Mercedes team chief Toto Wolff described George Russell as "cold-blooded" after the Briton's commanding win at the Austrian Grand Prix.

summary:
Winner of the Austrian Grand Prix, his second victory in 2026, George Russell has definitively got back on the right track in the Formula 1 championship, where he takes another 10 points back from Kimi Antonelli.

George Russell finally claimed his second victory of the 2026 Formula 1 campaign by winning the Austrian Grand Prix from pole ahead of Max Verstappen.

title: Five quick takeaways from the F1 Austrian GP
summary:
Mercedes weathers storm as Russell returns to form
Mercedes' rivals have thrown their proverbial kitchen sinks at the Silver Arrows in recent weeks with barrages of upgrades. title: Why Russell’s Austrian GP pole lap was legal
summary: When Max Verstappen lost control at Turn 9 on his final lap of Q3 at the Austrian Grand Prix, it seemed to lock in a Ferrari front row lock-out. But one key detail meant there were at least two cars that still had a chance to improve their lap time. And George Russell took that opportunity.

summary:
Qualifying for the Austrian Grand Prix ended in disarray after Max Verstappen crashed his Red Bull at the fast Turn 9 on his final push lap.
Championship leader Kimi Antonelli was also on a push lap, trying to improve on his previous time, and misinterpreted the waved yellow flags at the scene for double waved yellows.
